zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Grandison於1316年出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親Sir William de Grandison I61歲，母親Lady Sibyl de Tregoz45歲。她於1320年與William Montagu在英國英格蘭奧可福爾卡希頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年11月23日在英國波克夏比善姆享年33歲，埋葬在英國波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Grandison于1316年出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲Sir William de Grandison I61岁，母亲Lady Sibyl de Tregoz45岁。她于1320年与William Montagu在英国英格兰奧可福爾卡希頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年11月23日在英国波克夏比善姆享年33岁，埋葬在英国波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Grandison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Grandison was born in 1316, in London, England, her father, Sir William de Grandison I, was 61 and her mother, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, was 45. She married William Montagu in 1320, in Cassington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 November 1349, in Bisham, Berkshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Grandison est née en 1316, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Grandison I, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé William Montagu en 1320, à Cassington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1349, à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Grandison 1316 in London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Grandison I 61 und ihre Mutter Lady Sibyl de Tregoz 45. Sie hat 1320 in Cassington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom William Montagu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. November 1349 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Bisham, Berkshire, England und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Grandison è nata il nel 1316 nel London, England, sua padre, Sir William de Grandison I, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato William Montagu nel 1320, nel Cassington, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Grandisonが1316年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Grandison Iは61歳，母Lady Sibyl de Tregozは45歳であった。1320年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカシントンでWilliam Montaguと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年11月23日にイギリスバークシュアイアビシャムで33歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Grandison(이)가 1316년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Grandison I(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Sibyl de Tregoz(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 캐징턴에서 William Montagu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 11월 23일 영국 버크실르 비샤에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Grandison nasceu em 1316, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Grandison I, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com William Montagu em 1320, em Cassington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1349, em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Grandison родилась в 1316 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Grandison I было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Montagu в 1320 г. в местности кассингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 ноября 1349 г. в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия.
